.file-embed.background: rgb(212, 212, 212) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgb(196, 196, 196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(237, 237, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.font-family: "??", "??", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-breadcrumb-separator.font-family: "??", "??", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.font-family: "??", "??", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 0% / 10px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 0% / 10px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.8), rgba(19, 166, 240, 0.9)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(237, 237, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(237, 237, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(237, 237, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(196, 196, 196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(196, 196, 196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.font-family: "??", "??", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.multi-select-pill-content.font-family: "??", "??", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.prompt.background: rgb(237, 237, 237) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(196, 196, 196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: rgb(112, 112, 112) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(112, 112, 112) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(112, 112, 112) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgba(204, 0, 197, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
